description: Inspect the repository without a model round-trip

command: Inspect Cargo.toml and README.md, then summarize the workspace crates and their roles in five bullets.
Read docs/plugins.md plus the plugin-related Rust modules, then summarize the current plugin lifecycle, runtime execution path, and biggest remaining gaps.
Read crates/agent-core/src/control.rs and crates/agent-daemon/src/control_socket.rs, then return a JSON object summarizing the control-plane migration status.
